products.name: Women's Black Hoodie Dress with White Logo
products.description: Feeling cozy? This hoodie dress gives cozy a whole new meaning. It’s made from 85% organic ring-spun cotton and 15% recycled polyester, making it an eco-conscious choice.

products.name: Men's Black Hoodie with White Logo
products.description: With a large front pouch pocket and drawstrings in a matching color, this hoodie is a sure crowd-favorite. It’s soft, stylish, and perfect for the cooler evenings.

products.name: Unisex Black Zip Hoodie with White Logo
products.description: This zip hoodie features a drawcord for a stylish retro look. It is extremely comfortable, long lasting and durable. Flex Fleece construction. Metal zipper.

products.name: Unisex Black Lightweight Hoodie with White Logo
products.description: Soft fleece fabric for this trendy, comfy lightweight hoodi that's bound to become a wardrobe favorite. It's pre-shrunk, so it would last for a long time.

products.name: Women's Black Cropped Hoodie with White Logo
products.description: Comfort and style rolled in one — that's the easiest way to describe this fashion-forward hoodie. It serves as a great statement piece in any wardrobe, and with its trendy raw hem and matching drawstrings the hoodie is bound to become a true favorite.

products.name: Women's Gray Cropped Hoodie with Black Logo

products.name: Men's Black Sweatshirt with White Logo
products.description: This well-loved sweatshirt is the perfect addition to any man's wardrobe. It has a crew neck, and it's made from air-jet spun yarn and quarter-turned fabric, which eliminates a center crease, reduces pilling, and gives the sweatshirt a soft, comfortable feel.

products.name: Women's Black Cropped Sweatshirt with White Logo
products.description: There's a reason why everybody loves fleece — it's soft, warm, and looks great! That's why this trendy fleece cropped sweatshirt is the way to go to look fashionable while feeling perfectly comfy.
